[[File:Absurdity.svg|thumb]]
Absurdity is where there’s a fundamental gap in understanding that’s unbridgeable.

It can even extend into horror where you cannot look away because it is so important.

Many experience this with seeing car crashes and falling into a contemplation of death. They wonder whether they can see past the veil of death, and they just stare. They won’t see past the veil of death, at most they will see a dead body.

It’s an issue of disconnect between yourself and the cosmos.<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref>

It is one of the [[Nine Plagues]] and its booster shot is [[enlensing]]

It is linked to the concept of [[fatality]] in stoicism or the intrinsic application of meaning to events which thus makes people vulnerable to feeling bad when the events go in a way contrary to it. [[Romantic comedies]] are a key problem with the hydroplane of [[romance]]<ref name=":0">{{Citation|title=Reacting to the Meaning Crisis 15: Stoicism, Revenge of the God Emperors, and Techno Judaism|url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LRF1fyfgYeM|access-date=2022-11-15|language=en}}</ref>

It is sometimes seen as the antithesis to [[wonder]], while [[horror]] is an extreme form, and [[sacredness]] is seen as the antithesis of [[horror]].<ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 33</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-33-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-the-spirituality-of-rr-wonder-awe-mystery-sacredness/</ref>

==History==
Addressed by [[Stoicism]]<ref name=":0" />

[[Enlensing]] developed by [[Spinoza]]. <ref>{{Citation|title=Reacting to the Meaning Crisis 36-37 the Lambda Covenant|url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDwvHKJJjIQ&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=45|access-date=2022-11-15|language=en}}</ref>

==References==
[[Category:Absurdity]]
[[sn:Absurdity]]<references />
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Absurdity]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Absurdity]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
